title: Funeral held for baby shot dead by Israeli troops in occupied West Bank
summary_full: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.
summary_public: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.
